channel.title: announcements
channel.description: Latest releases from announcements on Dropout.tv

item.title: Introducing Dropout 24/7
item.description:
Introducing Dropout 24/7: a live broadcast stream on-site that airs all your fave Dropout content — just like regular TV!

Duration: 01:27

Tags: announcements, sam reich, livestream, broadcast channel, marathon, events, niche, curated, Dimension 20, Dropout 24/7
